title: Canadian Oatmeal Bake
description: A hearty, comforting oatmeal bake with a gooey center, perfect for a cold morning.
instructions: In a large bowl, mix together oats, brown sugar, egg, and spices.
Add diced apples and mix well.
Pour in milk and mix until combined.
Add melted butter and mix until a thick batter forms.
Pour the batter into a greased 9x9-inch baking dish.
Bake for 35-40 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the center is set.
Remove from oven and let cool for a few minutes.
Serve warm, topped with additional brown sugar and cinnamon if desired.
